changelog: Polish 12.1: token sweep across employee-triage, owner-styles, index-landing, order-track stylesheets — hardcoded #121212 / rgba(18,18,18,…) migrated to var(--secondary-color) / rgba(var(--secondary-color-rgb), …) so tenant secondary-color override propagates through employee shell, owner page, homepage marketing, and customer order-track timeline (~55 occurrences). Pre-push hook now runs npm run visual on push to main / release/* with graceful skip when Playwright/chromium/.env.local are not configured locally; CLEANMENU_NO_VISUAL=1 escape hatch for one-off bypass.
